---
title: "Mashawork"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(leaflet)
library(sf)
library(readr)
```

```{r}
states_sf <- read_sf("../data/raw/cb_2018_us_state_20m/cb_2018_us_state_20m.shp")

coverage <- read_csv("../data/raw/HeathCare_Coverage_US.csv") |>
  filter(Location != "United States") 

uninsured_sex <- read_csv("../data/raw/uninsured_sex_2024.csv", skip = 2) |>
  filter(!is.na(Male),
         !Location %in% c("Notes", "Sources", "Definitions", "Footnotes")) |>
  select(Location, Male, Female, Total) |>
  mutate(across(c(Male, Female, Total), as.numeric)) |>
  filter(Location != "United States") 
```

```{r}
combined <- coverage |>
  left_join(uninsured_sex, by = "Location", suffix = c("", "_sex"))

map_data <- states_sf |>
  left_join(combined, by = c("NAME" = "Location")) 

map_data |> st_drop_geometry() |> filter(is.na(Uninsured)) |> pull(NAME)
```

```{r}
pal <- colorNumeric(palette = "YlOrRd", domain = map_data$Uninsured)

popups <- pmap_chr(map_data |> st_drop_geometry(), function(NAME, Employer, `Non-Group`, 
                                                              Medicaid, Medicare, Military, 
                                                              Uninsured, Male, Female, ...) {
  paste0(
    "<b style='font-size:14px'>", NAME, "</b><br>",
    "<hr style='margin:3px 0'>",
    "<b>Coverage breakdown:</b><br>",
    "🏢 Employer: ", scales::percent(Employer, .1), "<br>",
    "👤 Non-Group: ", scales::percent(`Non-Group`, .1), "<br>",
    "🏥 Medicaid: ", scales::percent(Medicaid, .1), "<br>",
    "👴 Medicare: ", scales::percent(Medicare, .1), "<br>",
    "🪖 Military: ", scales::percent(Military, .1), "<br>",
    "❌ Uninsured: <b style='color:#d73027'>", scales::percent(Uninsured, .1), "</b><br>",
    "<hr style='margin:3px 0'>",
    "<b>Uninsured by sex (ages 19–64):</b><br>",
    "Male: ", scales::percent(Male, .1), " | Female: ", scales::percent(Female, .1))
})

leaflet(map_data) |>
  addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.Positron) |>
  addPolygons(
    fillColor   = ~pal(Uninsured),
    fillOpacity = 0.75,
    color       = "white",
    weight      = 1.5,
    highlight   = highlightOptions(
      weight       = 3,
      color        = "#555",
      fillOpacity  = 0.95,
      bringToFront = TRUE
    ),
    popup = popups,
    label = ~paste0(NAME, ": ", scales::percent(Uninsured, .1), " uninsured")
  ) |>
  addLegend(
    pal      = pal,
    values   = ~Uninsured,
    title    = "Uninsured Rate",
    labFormat = labelFormat(suffix = "%", transform = function(x) round(x * 100, 1)),
    position = "bottomright"
  )
```
